name: my-jobs-tracker
description: Job Application Tracker — save, organize, and track job applications with AI-powered extraction

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:extension"
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build && cd ../extension && npm run build
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
